silk.title: The Silk Road Empire Hotel is a one-of-a-kind historical boutique hotel that will transport you to the luxurious atmosphere of Uzbekistan's history. Our boutique hotel will take you on an unforgettable journey into the world of ancient Eastern history.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.description: The Silk Road Empire Hotel restaurant offers delicious dining right inside the hotel. Enjoy delicious, filling, and incredibly sophisticated cuisine without leaving the hotel. The restaurant's menu will pleasantly surprise you with its variety!

museum.title: Museum
museum.description: Another unique feature of the Silk Road Empire Hotel is its on-site museum. It displays unique traditional Uzbek costumes, as well as cultural artifacts from our ancient history. It's a wonderful opportunity to explore our cultural heritage while staying at our historic hotel.

terrace.title: Terrace
terrace.description: Fresh air at the Silk Road Empire Hotel! Enjoy delicious coffee or tea in the morning and unwind in the evenings after a busy day on our incredibly cozy terrace. Feel at home with us!

cancel.title: cancellation of booking
cancel.description: The guest can cancel the reservation free of charge until 18:00 on the day of arrival. The guest will be charged 50% of the total cost of the stay if cancelled after 18:00 on the day of arrival.

order.title: living order
order.description: All local couples are required to present a marriage certificate upon check-in.

home.desc: Welcome to the first historical boutique hotel in Samarkand, where the atmosphere is fully infused with the cultural heritage of the East!

desctop.first: Samarkand is one of the oldest cities in the world, whose walls still preserve the memory of the Great Silk Road.
desctop.second: Silk Road Empire Hotel is a one-of-a-kind historical boutique hotel that transports you into the luxurious atmosphere of Uzbekistan’s rich past. Our boutique hotel offers you an unforgettable journey into the world of ancient Eastern history.

mobile.desc: Samarkand is one of the oldest cities in the world, whose walls still preserve the memory of the Great Silk Road. Silk Road Empire Hotel is a one-of-a-kind historical boutique hotel that transports you into the luxurious atmosphere of Uzbekistan’s rich past. Our boutique hotel offers you an unforgettable journey into the world of ancient Eastern history.

right.desc: Silk Road Empire Hotel consists of rooms, each with its own unique story. Every corner of our boutique hotel is filled with centuries-old cultural heritage. We strive to provide you with the best service to make your stay truly unforgettable!

map.titleDesktop: OUR HOTEL LOCATIONS ON THE MAP

contacts.title: Ready to answer all questions
contacts.formTitle: Fill out the feedback form so that we can contact you.

guest.title: PERSONAL DETAILS
guest.phoneHint: If necessary, we will contact you to уточнить booking details
guest.emailHint: A booking confirmation with a cancellation option will be sent to your email
guest.name: Name
guest.paymentText: No prepayment is required. You will receive a confirmation email and present it at check-in.

modal.desc: We will call you back within 30 minutes, but in the meantime, you can check out our latest posts on Instagram: @silkroadempirehotel
